items.query: What trading style does the user prefer for Brent?
retrieved_texts: User prefers swing trading on Brent and WTI instead of scalp trading.
The assistant warned that OPEC headlines can create false intraday breakouts in Brent.
The user dislikes over-trading and asked for fewer but higher conviction setups.
The user said weekly and daily timeframes are more useful than 5-minute charts.
